# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of this project are currently being supported with security updates:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a potential security vulnerability in this project, please report it privately. 

**Do not open a public issue.**

Please report any security concerns directly to the project maintainer via GitHub's Private Vulnerability Reporting if enabled, or by contacting the maintainer directly.
